prompt: A street market, vibrant with colorful produce and buyers haggling under a canopy of hanging lights.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a vibrant, bustling street market, with an abundant display of colorful fresh produce on various stalls. Multiple buyers are engaged in animated haggling with vendors. Overhead, a dense canopy of warm, glowing string lights illuminates the entire market, creating an inviting evening atmosphere.
objects: Dense canopy of string lights overhead
